from fastapi import FastAPI

app = FastAPI()


@app.post("/users/batch")
async def create_users(users: list[dict]):
    results = []
    errors = []
    for user_data in users:
        try:
            user = create_user(user_data)
            results.append({"id": user.id, "status": "created"})
        except Exception as e:
            errors.append({"email": user_data.get("email"), "error": str(e)})
    return {"created": results, "errors": errors}


@app.put("/products/batch")
async def update_products(products: list[dict]):
    results = []
    for product_data in products:
        try:
            product = update_product(product_data)
            results.append({"id": product.id, "status": "updated"})
        except Exception as e:
            results.append({"id": product_data.get("id"), "status": "failed", "error": str(e)})
    return {"results": results}


@app.delete("/items/batch")
async def delete_items(item_ids: list[int]):
    deleted = 0
    failed = []
    for item_id in item_ids:
        try:
            delete_item(item_id)
            deleted += 1
        except Exception:
            failed.append(item_id)
    return {"deleted": deleted, "failed": failed}
